title: Consolida oligantha
intro: Consolida oligantha, also known as the narrow-spiked larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The health benefits of Consolida oligantha include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are thought to be responsible for its medicinal effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Consolida oligantha include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
taxonomy: Consolida oligantha is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is classified as a member of the genus Consolida, which includes a group of species commonly known as larkspurs. Consolida oligantha is often associated with Consolida ambigua, but it is a distinct species with its unique characteristics. The classification of Consolida oligantha is further supported by its morphological features and genetic analysis.
